title: ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO BALAYANG MABINI, PANGASINAN, TO BARRIO LUNA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1744 / 50 OG No. 6, 2387 (June, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1029, June 12, 1954 ]

ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO BALAYANG MABINI, PANGASINAN, TO BARRIO LUNA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Balayang, Mabini, Pangasinan, is hereby changed to barrio Luna.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
